description_long: This is an electric guitar with a modern, contoured solid body featuring sharp, angular cutaways and a sleek, ergonomic design. The body displays a striking pattern with dark blue and purple hues, accented by lighter lines, giving it a visually dynamic appearance. The neck is long and straight, with a dark fretboard and multiple frets, leading to a headstock with six inline tuning pegs. The bridge, pickups, and control knobs are visible on the front, indicating its functionality as a performance instrument. The back of the guitar is a solid, darker color, with the body thickness and ergonomic shaping clearly visible. The overall construction suggests a high-quality instrument suitable for urban musicians and street performers.
description: A modern electric guitar with a contoured, angular body in dark blue and purple, featuring a long neck, six inline tuning pegs, and visible pickups and controls.
description_view_0: The back of the guitar, showing the solid, contoured body and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: A thin side profile, highlighting the guitar's body thickness and the straightness of the neck.
description_view_2: The front of the guitar, displaying the vibrant patterned body, fretboard, pickups, bridge, and control knobs.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, again showing the body thickness and the alignment of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a modern, streamlined contour.
